CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Lavon Granger.
Appearances:
John Baba, Esq. for Plaintiff James M. Bryne also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendants Andrews Technology, Inc. and Garth Andrews as follows:
Damages of $504,085.00
Punitive Damages in the amount of $50,000.00
Attorney's fees of $2,143.50
Costs of $696.94
For the total of $556,925.44.
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-14-2003 Continued To Nov-25-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: M. Vallejo/V. Mack, CSR: Lois Jones
Appearances:
John P. Baba, Esq. for Plaintiff James M. Bryne, also present, was sworn & examined.
Exhibits:
1- Copy of the Lease Agreement
2- Statement of damages.
The Court finds that NO- Notice of Request for Punitive Damages was served on the defendant.
The Court continues the matter for 45 days to serve the Notice of Request for Punitive Damages on defendant until November 25,2003 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 218
